summary: Testing iteration 99: Bug fixes for date format DD-MM-YYYY, print receipt PDF (English only), and advance auto-fetch. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 bug fixes verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: fmtDate utility (/app/frontend/src/utils/date.js) correctly converts YYYY-MM-DD to DD-MM-YYYY
Backend fmt_d helper functions in hemali.py and daily_report.py match frontend logic
Advance auto-fetch uses 400ms debounce via setTimeout/clearTimeout pattern in useEffect
Print receipt PDF uses Helvetica font (English only) - no Hindi text to avoid ReportLab font issues
seed_data_creation: Marked payment 3c43b130 as paid to create Rs.400 advance for Ramesh (to test advance auto-fetch)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes working: (1) Date format DD-MM-YYYY displays correctly across all pages, (2) Print receipt PDF generates valid English-only PDF, (3) Advance auto-fetch triggers on 400ms debounce when typing sardar name in create dialog.

date_format_cashbook.details: Cash transactions show dates in DD-MM-YYYY format

date_format_ledgers.details: Party Ledgers show dates in DD-MM-YYYY format

date_format_salebook.details: Sale Book dates display as DD-MM-YYYY

print_receipt_pdf.details: Valid PDF generated with English text only, date in DD-MM-YYYY format

hemali_export_pdf_dates.details: PDF export uses DD-MM-YYYY date format in table

advance_auto_fetch.details: When typing 'Ramesh' in sardar name field, advance info (Rs.400) appears automatically after 400ms debounce

advance_api_known_sardar.details: Returns advance balance for known sardar

daily_report_date.details: Daily report API returns date field correctly

monthly_summary_month_format.details: Groups data by YYYY-MM month format

create_payment_dialog.debounce_behavior: 400ms delay before API call on sardar name change

bug_1_pdf_hindi_boxes.solution: PDF now uses English only text with Helvetica font
bug_1_pdf_hindi_boxes.verification: Print receipt endpoint returns valid PDF without encoding issues

bug_2_date_format.solution: fmtDate utility converts YYYY-MM-DD to DD-MM-YYYY for display
bug_2_date_format.verification: All tables show dates as DD-MM-YYYY (e.g., 15-03-2026)

bug_3_advance_auto_fetch.solution: useEffect with 400ms debounce triggers fetchAdvance when sardar_name changes
